hints: Use three pointers: prev, cur, and next_node.
Initialize prev to null and cur to head.
For each node, save the next node, reverse the link, then move forward.
Update: next_node = cur.next, cur.next = prev, prev = cur, cur = next_node.
Return prev as it will be the new head of the reversed list.
